tagline: Preventative care to maximize your roof's lifespan.
metaDescription: Roof maintenance and preventative service in Los Angeles County. Annual inspections, cleaning, sealant, and minor repairs. CA Lic. #1109337.
intro: A well-maintained roof lasts 20–40% longer than a neglected one. Palm Crest Roofing offers annual and semi-annual maintenance for residential and commercial roofs across LA County — catching small issues before they become expensive leaks.
benefits: Annual or semi-annual inspection and service
Debris removal from valleys, gutters, and drains
Minor shingle, tile, or membrane repair included
Priority response if a leak occurs between visits

process.title: Initial Inspection
process.desc: Baseline assessment of roof condition, flashing, drainage, and known issues.

process.title: Maintenance Plan
process.desc: Custom plan based on roof type, age, and risk factors — annual or semi-annual service.

process.title: Scheduled Visits
process.desc: Pre-winter and/or spring visits to clean, inspect, and perform minor repairs.

process.title: Photo Report
process.desc: After every visit you receive a photo report showing condition and any work performed.

process.title: Priority Support
process.desc: Maintenance customers get priority scheduling for any non-covered repairs.

faqs.q: How often should my roof be inspected?
faqs.a: Annually at minimum for composition roofs; semi-annually (spring and fall) for tile, flat, and commercial roofs. More often if you have heavy tree cover.

faqs.q: What's included in a maintenance visit?
faqs.a: Inspection, debris removal, valley and gutter cleaning, flashing and sealant touch-ups, and minor repairs up to a set value. Major repairs are quoted separately.

faqs.q: Do maintenance programs really save money?
faqs.a: Yes — dramatically. Most premature roof failures are caused by small issues (clogged drains, failed sealant, missing flashing) that go unnoticed until they cause major damage. Catching them early costs a fraction of the repair bill.
